compiled_state.title: Rewrite root README.md in plain language with link to INSTALL.md; clear RED marker
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Purpose
Rewrite root README.md in plain language so a non-engineer can understand what DSO does, and add a link to INSTALL.md. After this task the test-readme-structure.sh passes and the RED marker is removed.

## File Impact
- README.md — EDIT (rewrite in plain language)
- .test-index — EDIT (remove [test_readme_structure] marker)

## Implementation Steps

1. Rewrite `README.md` at repo root. Target length: 2–4 short paragraphs. Audience: a non-engineer team member or new platform engineer evaluating DSO for their project.

2. Recommended structure (adapt wording):

   # Digital Service Orchestra (DSO)

   DSO is a Claude Code plugin that adds a structured engineering workflow for teams building software with AI assistants. It helps you move from an idea to shippable code without losing track of what's been decided, what's been built, and what still needs testing.

   **What it does**
   - Breaks big ideas into epics, stories, and tasks that a human or an AI agent can pick up
   - Keeps tests, reviews, and documentation in sync with the code
   - Guards against common failure modes (unreviewed merges, missing tests, silent drift)

   **Who it's for**
   - Platform engineers setting up an AI-augmented workflow
   - Engineering teams that want their AI assistant to follow project conventions rather than invent them
   - Non-engineers who need visibility into what their team is building

   **Getting started**
   For installation steps, see [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md).

3. Remove the `[test_readme_structure]` marker from `.test-index`.
4. Run `bash tests/test-readme-structure.sh` and confirm exit 0.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] README.md contains the relative link to INSTALL.md
  Verify: grep -F '[INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md)' README.md
- [ ] README.md mentions Digital Service Orchestra
  Verify: grep -F 'Digital Service Orchestra' README.md
- [ ] README.md is non-trivial (> 500 bytes)
  Verify: test $(wc -c < README.md) -gt 500
- [ ] test-readme-structure.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/test-readme-structure.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -qF '[test_readme_structure]' .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: README.md rewritten with substantive content (~900 bytes, 4 prose paragraphs). All 7 assertions in tests/test-readme-structure.sh pass. [test_readme_structure] RED marker removed from .test-index.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: All acceptance criteria verified. README.md rewritten (1963 bytes, 4 prose paragraphs, mentions Digital Service Orchestra + plugin + Claude Code + workflow, links to INSTALL.md). test-readme-structure.sh PASSED 7/7. [test_readme_structure] RED marker removed from .test-index. git diff stat shows both files modified. Ready for commit.
comments.author: Test
